title: Service map
description: POC (see docs): Coroot-style entry point. Node Graph fed by Tempo's service-graph metrics; click a node to drill into service-detail. Wiring is in place: Tempo metrics-generator (service_graphs) → Prometheus remote-write, and the Tempo datasource's serviceMap.datasourceUid → Prometheus. Nodes appear once services have emitted spans.

panels.title: Service dependency map — click a node to open its detail page
